name: PVO
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Private voluntary organisation — the registration category for many NGOs; the regime is a declared research gap.

name: Restricted funds
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Donor money usable only for agreed purposes, tracked separately from unrestricted funds.

name: Burn rate
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Speed of grant spend against budget and time elapsed.

name: Advance liquidation
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Accounting for a field advance with receipts and returning any balance.

name: Costed workplan
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The activity budget that links programme plans to grant lines.

name: Sub-grant / partner agreement
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Funds passed to an implementing partner with flow-down obligations.

name: Cost share / match
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The organisation's own contribution required by some donors.

name: Per diem
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Daily field allowance paid under policy; configured in payroll or advances.
